channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Discord accused of exposing kids to graphic, violent content in lawsuit
item.description: The complaint, filed in New Jersey Superior Court, alleges Discord was aware of its safety features and policies but did not take action to protect young users.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Dell data center modernization gear targets AI, HPC workloads
item.description: Dell Technology has introduced a raft of new products aimed at advancing customers’ data center modernization projects capable of supporting a variety of workloads, from virtualization and database management to AI inferencing and high-performance computing (HPC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tesla really wants you to buy its Cybertruck, with huge discounts and perks thrown in to clear its growing inventory
item.description: Tesla is offering big discounts and free lifetime charging with new Cybertruck, but it's likely not enough to save its steel.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Everything new on Hulu in May 2025 – stream my favorite Pamela Anderson movie, celebrate Star Wars Day with the original trilogy and more
item.description: From reality TV and the original Star Wars trilogy, here's the full list of titles coming to Hulu in May 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: The project of reform and revival that saved JAL
item.description: A major turning point came for JAL in 2010 when the airline filed for bankruptcy and subsequently announced a proposed rehabilitation plan that included a much needed IT system renewal. Since 1967, JAL used the JALCOM reservation and ticketing system, built using Assembler on an IBM mainframe.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to deal with tech tariff terror
item.description: Are you confused about what President Donald J. Trump is doing with tariffs? Join the crowd; we all are. But if you’re in charge of buying PCs for your company (because Windows 10 officially reaches end-of-life status on Oct. 14) all this confusion is quickly turning into worry.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Leaked Razr Plus 2025 specs may have revealed everything about Motorola's next flip foldable
item.description: The Motorola Razr Plus 2025 (also known as the Motorola Razr 60 Ultra) will be made official on April 24.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New Jersey is suing Discord for allegedly violating child safety laws
item.description: New Jersey filed a lawsuit against Discord on Thursday, alleging that the social platform recklessly exposed children to “harassment, abuse, and sexual exploitation by predators who lurk on the platform.” The move makes it the first state to sue Discord.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Google's digital ad network declared an illegal monopoly, joining its search engine in penalty box
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google has been branded an abusive monopolist by a federal judge for the second time in less than a year, this time for illegally exploiting some of its online marketing technology to boost the profits fueling an internet empire currently worth $1.8 trillion.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SpaceX is the top contender to build Trump’s ‘Golden Dome’ missile shield, sources say
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX and two partners have emerged as frontrunners to win a crucial part of President Donald Trump’s “Golden Dome” missile defense shield, six people familiar with the matter said.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Netflix's first quarter builds on recent momentum as trade war drags down other tech companies
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Netflix fared better than analysts anticipated during the first three months of the year, signaling the world’s largest video streaming service is still thriving as President Donald Trump’s policies cast a pall on the economy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: San Jose mayor Mahan, local congressman Liccardo lend support as Waymo applies to bring robotaxis to the city
item.description: Waymo initially faced a rocky road in bringing its pioneering technology to Bay Area streets and highways.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Federal judge rules Google has illegal ad tech monopoly
item.description: A federal judge ruled Thursday that Google illegally acquired and maintained a monopoly over advertising technology, the second time in less than a year that the tech giant has been found in violation of antitrust laws. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Thankfully Mario Kart World will have some open-world challenges in Free Roam mode
item.description: Nintendo has confirmed that Mario Kart World's Free Roam mode will feature challenges and collectibles.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 7 simple ways to protect your credit cards while traveling
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson shares several easy ways to keep your credit cards safe from digital thieves while you're traveling this summer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GE Vernova’s CEO on thriving through tariffs and supply chain shifts
item.description: Amid tariff whiplash and the rejuggling of global trade, GE Vernova’s CEO Scott Strazik is finding a way to stay “relentlessly optimistic.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: 10 most used gen AI tools in the enterprise
item.description: Generative AI has entered the enterprise in a big way since OpenAI first launched ChatGPT in 2022. According to Precedence Research, the global gen AI market was over $25 billion in 2024 and is forecast to reach a staggering $803 billion by 2033.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Headlamp: A multicluster management UI for Kubernetes
item.description: As important as Kubernetes is to the modern cloud-native stack, it’s still not easy to use on your own hardware. That’s surprising, considering how long it’s been around.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Proposed rule change on endangered species triggers alarm for environmentalists
item.description: The Trump administration plans to rewrite part of the Endangered Species Act that prohibits harming the habitats of endangered and threatened species.
item.dc:creator: Tammy Webber, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg wraps up testimony in antitrust case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg emphasized in federal court on Wednesday that he bought Instagram and WhatsApp because he saw value in the companies — not to take out competitors, as the Federal Trade Commission alleges in a historic antitrust trial.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took to the witness stand on the first day of a historic antitrust trial to defend his company against allegations it illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia lays out plans to build AI supercomputers in the US
item.description: There was mixed reaction from industry analysts Monday over an announcement from Nvidia that it plans to produce AI supercomputers entirely in the US for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Windows Server 2025 domain controllers may lose connectivity after reboot, says Microsoft
item.description: Microsoft is warning IT administrators that their Windows Server 2025 domain controllers (DC) may lose network connectivity after they are restarted.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: As legacy of Ford fades in Brazil, China's BYD looks to extend global lead in EV sales
item.description: CAMACARI, Brazil (AP) — When Chinese automaker BYD Co. announced plans to build a massive factory in the hardscrabble city of Camacari, in Brazil’s northeastern Bahia state, locals saw a new beginning. After years of economic stagnation following Ford Motor Co.
item.dc:creator: FABIANO MAISONNAVE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KRON4
